overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Del Perro beachfront promenade at night. The scene features foggy atmospheric conditions, neon-lit storefronts with blue stucco facades, and classical white pillars lining the boardwalk. The character passes surf shops, food stands, and scattered pedestrians before walking into an open foggy plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered beachfront promenade with souvenir shops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered promenade past storefronts with red awnings and planter boxes

entered.detail: bright red fabric awning extending over the walkway from the blue building
two-story blue stucco building housing beachfront shops with large windows
wooden planter box with dense green foliage
vertical rack with colorful surfboards and bodyboards for sale
tall street lamps illuminating the foggy beach area in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a covered beachfront promenade. The camera follows the character past blue stucco storefronts with red canvas awnings and wooden planter boxes. Surfboard displays and neon signs are visible against the building facade while street lamps pierce the haze over the beach to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: surf shop entrance with colorful murals and merchandise displays

events.description: pedestrian in a dress walks past the camera from right to left, crossing the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past the surf shop mural and cardboard box merchandise displays

notable_agents.action: woman in a light-colored dress walking toward and then past the camera

entered.detail: large psychedelic spiral mural in green, yellow, and red on the building wall
yellow sign with 'Del Perro' text above the shop entrance
stacked cardboard boxes with merchandise spilling out onto the sidewalk
colorful foam bodyboards leaning against the building
classical white columns with decorative capitals lining the colonnade ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes the surf shop with its distinctive colorful spiral mural and 'Del Perro' signage. Cardboard boxes and bodyboards are displayed on the sidewalk. A pedestrian woman walks past the camera, and white classical pillars become visible further down the colonnade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade with classical pillars and picnic seating

events.description: moving deeper into the covered colonnade with repeating white pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through the pillared colonnade past wooden benches and trash receptacles

entered.detail: black metal trash receptacle between the pillars
wooden picnic tables and benches lined up under the colonnade
tall vertical sign reading 'T-SHIRTS' in red letters
American flag hanging from the colonnade ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the covered colonnade section defined by repeating white fluted pillars with decorative capitals. Wooden picnic benches line the right side, and a vertical 'T-SHIRTS' sign becomes visible. The American flag hangs from the ceiling ahead as the foggy beach remains visible through the arches.

scene_state.functional_zone: food concession area opening to foggy beach plaza

events.description: passing the food stand and emerging from the colonnade into the open plaza
character continues walking away from camera into the foggy open plaza

agents.ego_description: following the character past the burger stand and watching them walk into the foggy open plaza

notable_agents.action: character walking away from camera into the foggy plaza beyond the pillars

entered.detail: food service window with illuminated menu and service counter
large pink donut graphic on white sign advertising donuts
standing menu board displaying burger and combo meal options

segments.scene_description: The character passes a food concession stand with a prominent pink donut sign and burger menu board. Leaving the colonnade, the scene opens into a foggy plaza where the character walks away from the camera. The white pillars recede to the right as street lamps and palm tree silhouettes fade into the thick fog ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy beachfront promenade that transitions from a neon-lit commercial strip into an open, atmospheric plaza. It begins by following a character past blue stucco storefronts with red awnings and glowing neon signs, while street lamps pierce the haze over the adjacent beach. As the character passes a colorful spiral mural and surfboard displays, the scene shifts toward a covered colonnade defined by repeating white fluted pillars and wooden picnic benches. The camera then glides past a food stand with a prominent pink donut sign before leaving the shelter of the arches. Finally, the environment opens into a wide, foggy plaza where the white pillars recede to the right and palm tree silhouettes fade into the thick mist ahead.
